creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
When i start veloren-voxygen it crashes with this error:

Panic Payload: "called `Result::unwrap()` on an `Err` value: NotFound(\"/usr/home/usr/.emacs.d/assets/voxygen/i18n/en\")"
PanicInfo: panicked at 'called `Result::unwrap()` on an `Err` value: NotFound("/usr/home/usr/.emacs.d/assets/voxygen/i18n/en")', voxygen/src/main.rs:147:9
Game version: v0.7.0 [2020-08-15-12:27]

Backtrace:
   0: <unknown>
   1: <unknown>
   2: <unknown>
   3: <unknown>
   4: <unknown>
   5: <unknown>
   6: <unknown>
   7: <unknown>
   8: <unknown>

Uncaught panic, exiting
Abort (core dumped)

When start veloren-server-cli with that:

Aug 22 11:44:16.518  INFO veloren_server_cli: Starting server...
Aug 22 11:44:17.115  WARN veloren_world::sim: Couldn't read asset specifier for maps e=NotFound("/usr/home/usr/.emacs.d/assets/world/map/veloren_0_6_0_0") specifier="world.map.veloren_0_6_0_0"
